hero.description: Founded by Ikbal Chariffou, Kazepices Madagascar embodies a simple vision: offering high-quality natural products while respecting people and the environment.

video.description: Discover our journey, our values, and the passion behind every Kazepices product.
video.srDescription: Video player showing the Kazepices Madagascar presentation.

protocol.step1Desc: Our spices are hand-picked by passionate Malagasy farmers at the optimal moment of maturity.
protocol.step2Desc: Natural drying, artisanal grinding, and rigorous quality control in our workshops in Madagascar.
protocol.step3Desc: Carefully packaged in beautiful, professional packaging, ready to elevate your recipes.

products.description: Each product is grown, harvested, and packaged in Madagascar with unique artisanal expertise.

productsPage.title: Our Products — Natural Spices & Oils | Kazepices Madagascar
productsPage.metaDesc: Full Kazepices catalog: turmeric, black pepper, ginger, moringa, cinnamon powder, and moringa oil. 100% natural, chemical-free.
productsPage.description: Each product is grown, harvested, and packaged in Madagascar with unique artisanal expertise. Guaranteed provenance, uncompromising quality.
productsPage.helpDesc: Contact us through our form for any questions.
productsPage.noResultsHint: Try another term or adjust the filters.

productDetail.orderDesc: Contact us for any questions or to place an order.

about.title: Our Story & Commitments — Kazepices Madagascar
about.metaDesc: Founded by Ikbal Charifou, Kazepices celebrates the natural treasures of Madagascar. Discover our mission, commitments, and expertise.
about.heroDesc: Born in the heart of Madagascar, Kazepices is much more than a spice brand. It is a mission: to offer exceptional natural products while respecting people and the environment.
about.originP1: What if the secret to better health lay in the heart of one of the richest islands on the planet? It was from this belief that Kazepices Madagascar was born — a brand that turned this idea into a true mission.
about.originP2Start: At the heart of Kazepices lies a clear mission:
about.originP2End: , while respecting people and the environment. The brand proves that you can have both: exceptional products grown with the utmost respect for those who cultivate them and the land that nourishes them.
about.originQuote: "In Madagascar, an island rich in natural resources, a committed brand was born."
about.founderDesc: Behind every great initiative, there is always a human story, a passion. Ikbal Charifou is not just an entrepreneur — he is above all a passionate visionary. Deeply convinced that nature holds treasures for our well-being, his commitment is to make these treasures accessible in the purest and most ethical way possible.
about.founderQuote: Nature offers us its treasures. Our mission is to make them accessible in the purest and most ethical way possible.
about.founderAttribution: — Ikbal Charifou, Founder of Kazepices Madagascar
about.founderImageAlt: Ikbal Charifou — Founder of Kazepices Madagascar
about.savoirDesc: A virtuous cycle where everyone wins — from the land of Madagascar to your table.
about.savoirStep1Desc: Everything is grown by local farmers, directly supporting communities on the ground. Our partners carry on expertise passed down through generations.
about.savoirStep2Desc: Harvesting is done by hand, preserving quality and traditions. Each spice is picked at the optimal moment of maturity.
about.savoirStep3Desc: Produced with respect for the environment, every step is designed to minimize ecological impact. Zero chemicals, natural sun-drying.
about.bridgeHeading2: It's a bridge between Madagascar and the world."
about.bridgeDesc: Kazepices connects the richness of a land, the work of its people, and consumers worldwide seeking meaning and well-being. From Madagascar to Paris, our story continues to unfold — an invitation to reconnect with what matters and trust in nature.
about.ctaDesc: Discover our 100% natural products or contact us to learn more about our approach.

contact.title: Contact Us — Kazepices Madagascar
contact.metaDesc: Order your natural spices from Madagascar via our contact form. Guaranteed response within 24 hours.
contact.heroDesc: A question, an order, or a partnership? We're here to help. Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.successMsg: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

contact.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.errorMessageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters.

contactCTA.heading: Ready to order?
